description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a distinctive two-tone color scheme featuring a white body and black roof. The car has a sharply contoured hood, large air intakes, and slim, aggressive headlights at the front. Its side profile reveals sculpted doors, flush handles, and prominent wheel arches housing large, multi-spoke alloy wheels. The rear is characterized by a wide stance, integrated taillights, and subtle blue accents, with no visible rear spoiler. The windows are tinted, and the roofline smoothly tapers towards the back, enhancing its sporty appearance. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle, likely constructed from lightweight materials such as aluminum and composites.
description: A low, aerodynamic white sports car with a black roof, sculpted body lines, and large multi-spoke alloy wheels. Blue accents and a wide stance emphasize its modern, high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive headlights, contoured hood, and wide grille with blue accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sleek profile, sculpted doors, and large multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide stance, integrated taillights, and subtle blue accents, with no visible spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic lines and prominent wheel arches.
